response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, strong fundamentals, TDD discipline, and exposure to distributed/high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic). However, the role specifically targets Principal/IC6-level leadership of growth and experimentation platforms, and the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry platforms, or large-scale measurement systems. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and team-scope evidence fall short of IC6 expectations, and the required Microsoft-stack languages (C#, Java) are listed as skills but not central to recent work.
strengths: 13+ years across backend, frontend, embedded, and high-throughput microservices (millions of req/s at Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring, public workshops
Polyglot with production experience in TypeScript/Node, D, C/C++, plus current AI-agent/MCP tooling work
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or guardrail metrics
Scope and influence appear team-level rather than multi-team/org-wide as expected at Principal/IC6
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure ownership or statistical/data-science partnership at scale

key_factors.factor: Scope below Principal/IC6 (no multi-workstream org-wide leadership)
Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale systems background
